canonical_definition: CHIME (Hsu et al., 2024), a taxonomy-generation baseline that extracts claims and frequent entities and prompts an LLM to build a hierarchical structure.
papers: Grouping Entities with Shared Properties using Multi-Facet Prompting and Property Embeddings
Incorporating Diverse Perspectives in Cultural Alignment: Survey of Evaluation Benchmarks Through A Three-Dimensional Framework
